framework.name: Agent-to-Agent Marketing Paradigm Shift
framework.description: The introduction of agent payment systems fundamentally questions traditional marketing: if agents can instantly process product data as code, why would they consume visual ads, videos, or traditional marketing content? This suggests a shift toward structured data APIs and machine-readable product information as the new marketing interface.
framework.raw_quote: why does an agent need to sit and watch a fancy flashy video ad or a real or something like that when all of that information can just be instantly processed in code? So, do we all just have a database of code now that are open and accessible to these purchasing agents now at all times?

source.title: Episode 327: AI Gets Credit Cards -  "Intelligent Commerce" & "Agent Pay"
